hero.title: Kũlya ũmanyĩw'e Mbivilia
hero.lead: IATF nĩtetheeasya andũ kwĩka ũkunĩkĩli nũndũ ve vata mũnene wa kwĩka ũu.
support: Ndũkeanĩwe no kũmanya ũsũngĩo wa ĩkũlyo yĩu, ĩndĩ nũseo ũsũanĩe ĩkũlyo yĩĩ ya vata. Ĩkũlye-ĩ, 'Nĩ kyaũ kĩtonya kũndetheesya ngethĩwa na mũĩkĩĩo mũlũmu vyũ kana kwĩ Ngai?'

intro: Syĩndũ syonthe ila iseũvĩtw'e syaĩle kũseũvw'a nesa vyũ ũndũ vatonyeka.

items.label: Kĩsese kya Indaneti
items.body: Tũmĩa vomu ĩla yĩ vaa ĩtheo nĩ kana ũandĩke maũndũ maku ma kũtũmĩa ũtavany'anĩ.

items.label: Email-ĩ yaku
items.body: Kũlya ũmanyĩw'e Mbivilia ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ethĩwa ũvoo ũla wĩ nthĩnĩ wa kaati ĩno nũũkũlw'a nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ eka ũla ũkwendaa kũwĩtya, no avĩndũe ũvoo ũsu nĩ kana awikethye andũ ala angĩ.

items.label: Kwĩthĩwa na Ngusanĩsyo
items.body: Ethĩwa ũu nĩw'o vaĩle kwĩthĩwa vailyĩ, wĩona ata ũkosa ĩvinda yĩu wĩ nayo ũkethukĩĩsya kĩla kĩũneenewa?

guidance.title: Ũtanamba kũtũma e-mail
paragraphs: IATF ĩtethasya wĩa wayo andũnĩ onthe. Makũlyo ala me vo no masũngĩwe na mũandĩkĩle wa mawoni ma andũ onthe nthĩnĩ wa GitHub, Kĩsesenĩ kĩĩ, kana o kũndũ kũngĩ kw'onthe.

Ndũkatate kũweta masyĩtwa ma ala ũũneena namo, namba syoo sya simũ, ũvoo woo ĩũlũ wa ũiiti ũla manakuie, kana o maũndũ angĩ makonetye andũ ala matũmĩĩte simũ ĩsu. Ethĩwa nũkwĩw'a ũu, manya kana ti lasima IATF ĩlike wĩanĩ wayo.
IATF nĩyumasya ũvoo w'onthe ũla ũkonetye andũ ĩtanamba kũwumya.

review.title: Maũndũ ala mekwatĩtw'e
paragraphs: Kũkũlya ũtethyo ti kwonany'a kana ũkasũvĩwa.
IATF nĩsiasya kana mawĩa asu me kĩvathũkany'o, nĩ ma vata, na nĩmatonya kũtũmĩwa nĩ nzama ĩla ĩtongoesye.
O na ĩngĩ, ngalama yĩthĩawa yongeleka kuma vu na kũendeea.

fields.name: Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova
fields.label: Nzĩa ĩla ĩtonya kwĩkwatw'a ya kũthi kũu

fields.name: Ũneenany'a na Ala Angĩ
fields.label: Maelesyo ma kwĩkwatany'a
fields.helper: Email address kana kĩsese kya kũea ngewa na ala mekwendeew'a kĩsesenĩ kya Discord nĩ kana ũmanye ũndũ ũtonya kwĩka.
fields.placeholder: Email address kana mũndũ ũngĩ ũtonya kũneena nake

fields.name: thĩna
fields.label: Nĩ thĩna wĩva wĩ naw'o?
fields.helper: Elesya thĩna ũla ũtonya kwĩthĩwa naw'o.

fields.name: Andũ Ala Matatĩĩaa Ũthaithi wa Mũsyĩ
fields.label: Naaũ makonetw'e nĩ ũndũ ũsu?
fields.helper: Ve mũndũ ũtonya kũtetheka nĩ ngelekany'o ĩsu?

fields.name: extraMavuku ala me kĩlungunĩ kĩĩ
fields.label: Maũndũ angĩ
fields.helper: Ĩthĩwa na syĩndũ ingĩ itonya kũũtetheesya kũelewa ĩandĩko yĩu. Kwa ngelekany'o, sũanĩa ĩũlũ wa vandũ vana vethĩĩtwe kũseũvw'a syĩndũ sya tene, kana ve vandũ vatũmĩĩtwe ĩvinda ya tene.

fields.name: openSourceConsent (Kĩsese kya kw'oko kwa aũme)
fields.label: We nĩwĩtĩkĩlanaa na maũndũ ala tweewa nĩtwĩke makonetye ũtavany'a?
fields.helper: Mĩvango ĩla yeetĩkĩlĩtw'e nĩ IATF nĩyaĩlĩte kũatĩĩwa nĩ nthĩ syonthe.

header.title: Nĩ kyaũ kyonanaw'a nĩ ndeto ĩsu?

items: Kĩsese kya kwĩkwatany'a kya IATF GitHub
Mĩaonĩ ya copyleft, namba na syĩndũ ila itũmĩawa kũseũvya vitio no iandĩkwe, o na no ikwatĩkane kwa ithyomo syĩ kĩvathũkany'o.
Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova
Kĩsese kya IATF kĩ na ũandĩko wa ũtheinĩ

header.title: Kũkũlya ũtethyo o kwa ũkuvĩ na kwa nzĩa ĩyumĩlĩtye nĩkũtethasya mũno.

paragraphs: Ethĩwa kwa w'o ve thĩna wĩ naw'o na nũkwenda kũtetheew'a vala ũtonya na ũyĩthĩa no ũkwĩw'a waĩle kwongelanga kĩthito ũndũnĩ ũsu, neena naitũ.
